languages.text: {n}Манипулус экспрессивно вскидывает многочисленные конечности, едва не скатываясь в воду.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, я нахожу удручающим юмор, построенный на вольном трактовании лингва технис! Со всем почтением, призываю вас относиться к словам моего коллеги более вдумчиво!"

{n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус экспрессивно вскидывает многочисленные конечности, едва не скатываясь в воду.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, я нахожу удручающим юмор, построенный на вольном трактовании лингва технис! Со всем почтением, призываю вас относиться к словам моего коллеги более вдумчиво!"

traits.locale_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

{n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

{n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

languages.text: {n}El manipulus levanta ostentosamente sus numerosas extremidades con tanto ímpetu que casi se cae al agua.{/n} «¡Comerciante, considero de muy mal gusto el humor basado en una traducción libre de la lingua tecnis! ¡Con el debido respeto, le insto a interpretar con más cuidado las palabras de mi colega!».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus levanta ostentosamente sus numerosas extremidades con tanto ímpetu que casi se cae al agua.{/n} «¡Comerciante, considero de muy mal gusto el humor basado en una traducción libre de la lingua tecnis! ¡Con el debido respeto, le insto a interpretar con más cuidado las palabras de mi colega!».

languages.text: {n}操纵者激动地挥舞起自己的众多肢体，差点整个人翻进水里。{/n}“行商浪人，我认为这种建立在对科技文的宽泛误译之上的幽默，实在是令人沮丧！我以最深的敬意，恳请您多留意我同僚的言辞！”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者激动地挥舞起自己的众多肢体，差点整个人翻进水里。{/n}“行商浪人，我认为这种建立在对科技文的宽泛误译之上的幽默，实在是令人沮丧！我以最深的敬意，恳请您多留意我同僚的言辞！”

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus agite vivement ses nombreux membres et manque de peu de tomber dans le bain.{/n} « {rt_mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, je n'apprécie guère l'humour basé sur une traduction libérale du langage technique ! Avec tout le respect que je vous dois, je vous prie de faire plus attention aux paroles de mon collègue ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus agite vivement ses nombreux membres et manque de peu de tomber dans le bain.{/n} {rt_mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, je n'apprécie guère l'humour basé sur une traduction libérale du langage technique ! Avec tout le respect que je vous dois, je vous prie de faire plus attention aux paroles de mon collègue ! »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, çok sayıda uzvunu coşkuyla havaya kaldırıyor ve neredeyse suya yuvarlanıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, Lingua Technis'in serbest çevirisi üzerine kurulan mizahı moral bozucu buluyorum! Saygısızlık etmemekle birlikte sizi meslektaşımın sözlerine karşı daha dikkatli olmaya davet ediyorum!"
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus, çok sayıda uzvunu coşkuyla havaya kaldırıyor ve neredeyse suya yuvarlanıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, Lingua Technis'in serbest çevirisi üzerine kurulan mizahı moral bozucu buluyorum! Saygısızlık etmemekle birlikte sizi meslektaşımın sözlerine karşı daha dikkatli olmaya davet ediyorum!"

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスは何本もの肢を勢いよく振り上げ、危うく自ら水中に転がり込みそうになった。{/n}「ローグトレーダー、リングア・テクニスのいい加減な翻訳に基づくユーモアには、私は気が滅入ります！ 最大限の敬意をもって申し上げますが、我が同僚の言葉にもっと心を配っていただきたいのです！」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスは何本もの肢を勢いよく振り上げ、危うく自ら水中に転がり込みそうになった。{/n}「ローグトレーダー、リングア・テクニスのいい加減な翻訳に基づくユーモアには、私は気が滅入ります！ 最大限の敬意をもって申し上げますが、我が同僚の言葉にもっと心を配っていただきたいのです！」

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus wirft seine vielen Gliedmaßen in die Luft und fällt beinahe in das Wasser.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, ich empfinde auf einer ungenauen Übersetzung der Lingua Technis basierenden Humor als entmutigend! Ich bitte Euch bei allem Respekt, bezüglich der Worte meines Kollegen achtsamer zu sein!"
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"

Ich bitte Euch bei allem Respekt, bezüglich der Worte meines Kollegen achtsamer zu sein!"
